zh.Turenne,19273,Corrèze,Nouvelle-Aquitaine: 法國努維勒-阿吉泰可雷圖倫
法國努維勒-阿吉泰可雷圖倫
zh.Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Fr: 法國努維勒-阿吉泰可雷圖倫
zh.lifeSummary: 當Raymond II de TURENNE於大約1143年10月出生在法國努維勒-阿吉泰可雷圖倫時，他的父親Boson II de TURENNE33歲，母親Eustorgie d'ANDUZE24歲。他於大約1165年與Hélise de ROUERGUE在法國努維勒-阿吉泰可雷圖倫結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1191年在以色列מחוז הצפוןעַכּוֹ享年49歲。

zh-hans.Turenne,19273,Corrèze,Nouvelle-Aquitaine: 法国努維勒-阿吉泰可雷圖倫
法国努維勒-阿吉泰可雷圖倫
zh-hans.Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Fr: 法国努維勒-阿吉泰可雷圖倫
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Raymond II de TURENNE于大约1143年10月出生在法国努維勒-阿吉泰可雷圖倫时，他的父亲Boson II de TURENNE33岁，母亲Eustorgie d'ANDUZE24岁。他于大约1165年与Hélise de ROUERGUE在法国努維勒-阿吉泰可雷圖倫结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1191年在以色列מחוז הצפוןעַכּוֹ享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: TURENNE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Normand, Donat, Emile, Francois, Philomene, Serge, Yves.
French: habitational name from Turenne, the name of several places in the southwestern part of France, e.g. in Corrèze, named with pre-Latin tur ‘height’.
History: Pierre Blanchard dit Turenne from Poitiers in Vienne, France, married Gertrude-Michelle Dupuis in Trois-Rivières, QC, in 1733.

nameMeanings.name: Raymond
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Raimund, of Germanic origin, from ragin ‘advice, decision’ + mund ‘protector’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. Subsequently it dropped out of use, but was revived in the middle of the 19th century, together with several other given names of Old English and Norman origin.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Raymond II de TURENNE was born about October 1143, in Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, his father, Boson II de TURENNE, was 33 and his mother, Eustorgie d'ANDUZE, was 24. He married Hélise de ROUERGUE about 1165, in Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He died about 1191, in Acre, Northern, Israel, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Raymond II de TURENNE est né environ octobre 1143, à Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, son père, Boson II de TURENNE, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Eustorgie d'ANDUZE, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Hélise de ROUERGUE environ 1165, à Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé environ 1191, à Acre, Northern, Israël, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Raymond II de TURENNE um Oktober 1143 in Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Boson II de TURENNE 33 und seine Mutter Eustorgie d'ANDUZE 24. Er hat um 1165 in Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich Hélise de ROUERGUE geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb um 1191 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Acre, Northern, Israel.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Raymond II de TURENNE è nato il circa ottobre 1143 nel Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, il suo padre, Boson II de TURENNE, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Eustorgie d'ANDUZE, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Hélise de ROUERGUE circa 1165, nel Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì circa 1191, nel Acre, Northern, Israele, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.Turenne,19273,Corrèze,Nouvelle-Aquitaine: フランスノウベレ-アクイティアインコルeズトゥレン
フランスノウベレ-アクイティアインコルeズトゥレン
ja.Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Fr: フランスノウベレ-アクイティアインコルeズトゥレン
ja.lifeSummary: Raymond II de TURENNEが約1143年10月にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインコルeズトゥレンで生まれた時，父Boson II de TURENNEは33歳，母Eustorgie d'ANDUZEは24歳であった。約1165年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインコルeズトゥレンでHélise de ROUERGUEと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は約1191年にイスラエルמחוז הצפוןעַכּוֹで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Raymond II de TURENNE(이)가 대략 1143년 10월 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 코e즈 터렌에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Boson II de TURENNE(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Eustorgie d'ANDUZE(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1165년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 코e즈 터렌에서 Hélise de ROUERGUE(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1191년 이스라엘 מחוז הצפון עַכּוֹ에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.ABT OCT 1143–ABT 1191: tany ho any amin'ny ôktôbra 1143–tany ho any amin'ny 1191

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Raymond II de TURENNE nasceu aproximadamente outubro de 1143, em Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, seu pai, Boson II de TURENNE, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Eustorgie d'ANDUZE, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Hélise de ROUERGUE aproximadamente 1165, em Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1191, em Acre, Northern, Israel, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Raymond II de TURENNE родился около октябрь 1143 г. в местности туренн, коррeз, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция, его отцу по имени Boson II de TURENNE было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Eustorgie d'ANDUZE, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Hélise de ROUERGUE около 1165 г. в местности туренн, коррeз, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер около 1191 г. в местности עַכּוֹ, מחוז הצפון, Израиль в возрасте 49 лет.

sm.ABT OCT 1143–ABT 1191: e tusa o le Oketopa 1143–e tusa o le 1191

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Raymond II de TURENNE nació aproximadamente octubre de 1143, en Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, su papá, Boson II de TURENNE, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Eustorgie d'ANDUZE, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Hélise de ROUERGUE aproximadamente 1165, en Turenne, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1191, en Acre, Northern, Israel, a la edad de 49 años.
